item.title: This guy Christopher Pullease was shifted to desk duty until he was able to retire at 47 with with his pension..
item.description: ..he was charged but has yet to see prison time or any punishment, instead it's been "under investigation" for four and a half years. You can go here https://www.browardclerk.org/web2 and put in his case number Broward County Case Number: 22007058CF10A , to stay up to date.

item.title: Dump of tools.
item.description:
Improvisation at its finest.
Inertia Log Splitter.
I've been waiting to try this Makita 12" snow thrower all winter and finally i got my hands on it
I'm currently stuck to the refrigerator.
Need me such handy tools.
Tethered tool belt.
Great idea.
Nail hiders.
Clamp-Free Guide Rail Tool.
Belt Edge Beveler.
Square & Round Collet Blocks or Bezel Blocks.
Do you use this method ?
A next investment ?
Rubber mallet.
Cool.
Chain Mortiser.
Accurate fastening every time.
Professional sharpening system.
Fence post remover.
Magnet Trick Electricians Love.
Metal edges trimmer.
Water lamps are sustainable, portable lanterns that generate electricity from saltwater or fresh water mixed with salt.
To stay clean.
Rotary Pipe Cutter.

item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Ukraine: The balloon wars have begun.
item.description: THE BALLOON WARS Ukraine is using helium balloons to fight Russia. Aerobavovna, a Kyiv company, deploys aerostats at high altitude. Two jobs. Offensive. Balloons drift over Russian territory on stratospheric winds and drop explosive drones on targets thousands of miles inside Russia. Cheap. Hard to intercept. Forces Russia to waste expensive air defenses on a balloon. Defensive. Balloons hover at Shahed altitude with thermal cameras. When they spot an incoming Russian drone, they release an FPV interceptor to take it down before it hits a Ukrainian city. A 500 dollar balloon plus a 5000 dollar drone beating million dollar weapons systems.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 429
item.description:
Oh. This snuck in, couldn’t get it out of my head since a stay in an Irish convent absolute yonks ago so looked it up. Short and sweet. Um enjoy I guess.
Reminded me a bit of:
One of the stickers on my work comp says ’be kind to me, I’m from the 1900s’.
Oh shoot. This snuck in too - one of my faves, the two-foot high kick.
From an old post, saved to torture friends. As I keep saying - we do horrible things to food.

item.title: GovBrief Today #474
item.description: Todd Blanche killed a $100 million IRS audit on the Trump family Tuesday with a one-page memo. Blanche, Trump's former criminal defense attorney and now acting attorney general, settled the $10 billion lawsuit Trump filed against his own IRS Monday. The Trump family would receive "a formal apology but no monetary payment." Tuesday's memo revealed the actual payment: the IRS is "FOREVER BARRED" from auditing the Trump family or its businesses. Senators grilling Blanche that day hadn't seen the memo. Trump sued his own government for $10 billion. He walked away with permanent audit immunity for his past returns and a $1.8 billion fund he controls. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to demand Congress reverse both before Trump's allies line up for their cut. I've emailed 7,481 stories over 474 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260519-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/landry-visit [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may19 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iowa-restrictions [4] https://go.govbrief.today/sc-house [5] https://go.govbrief.today/attack-investigation [6] https://go.govbrief.today/mask-id-ct [7] https://go.govbrief.today/education-suit [8] https://go.govbrief.today/arrest-court [9] https://go.govbrief.today/mesa-visit [10] https://go.govbrief.today/bank-citizenship [11] https://go.govbrief.today/usda-ai [12] https://go.govbrief.today/war-powers-cassidy [13] https://go.govbrief.today/paxton-endorsed [14] https://go.govbrief.today/massie-loses [15] https://go.govbrief.today/cisa-leak [16] https://go.govbrief.today/irs-trump [17] https://go.govbrief.today/trade-investigation [18] https://go.govbrief.today/bedminster-reflecting [19] https://go.govbrief.today/caputo-fund [20] https://go.govbrief.today/colorado-gender-care Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Why the Left Lose
item.description: Fp edit: Some of the conversations happening in the comments section here have proveing the point. Edit: Okay, look at the little dick energy going through the comments. Downvoting everybody. So cute. At least they're getting the attention they want.) First and foremost, this is a company/creator I personally support and have survived off their donated food a few times. Please watch this from front to back. And let me know what you think, because this is exactly what I've been trying to articulate for so long. Please go support the original creator and go watch more of their content. Farming While Beige. https://youtu.be/v8gVFuWay8o https://blackbirdcoop.com
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered
